introSection: Garuda Valley is a roller coaster at Sun World Da Nang Downtown in Vietnam. The ride originally operated at Freestyle Music Park.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Garuda Valley opened as Shake, Rattle & Rollercoaster at Hard Rock Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA on 15 April 2008. When the park was re-branded as Freestyle Music Park in 2009, the roller coaster was renamed Hang Ten.

After Freestyle Music Park closed in 2009, Hang Ten remained standing but not operating through 2014. It was then relocated to Sun World Da Nang Downtown, where it reopened in 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Originally painted white with beige supports. When it was relocated, the track was repainted blue and the supports orange.

fullText:
Garuda Valley is a roller coaster at Sun World Da Nang Downtown in Vietnam. The ride originally operated at Freestyle Music Park.

Garuda Valley opened as Shake, Rattle & Rollercoaster at Hard Rock Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA on 15 April 2008. When the park was re-branded as Freestyle Music Park in 2009, the roller coaster was renamed Hang Ten.

After Freestyle Music Park closed in 2009, Hang Ten remained standing but not operating through 2014. It was then relocated to Sun World Da Nang Downtown, where it reopened in 2015.

Originally painted white with beige supports. When it was relocated, the track was repainted blue and the supports orange.
